Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Compliance With Defendants Request For Production Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-03-2021 Set For Trial On May-09-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Form Interrogatories General, Set No. One And Form Interrogatories Employment Law, Set No. One
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearances, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on Defendant Curry Senior Center's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Further Responses To Form Interrogatories General, Set No. One And Form Interrogatories Employment Law, Set No. One as follows:

Motion granted. Plaintiff's responses are insufficient. Supplemental responses shall be served by November 14, 2021. The various requests for sanctions are denied.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at: davididaho14@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: J. Alameda, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jul-28-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2021 Set For Trial On Feb-28-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
